name: J-J-Jump
author: Poki
description: Get ready to leap in J-J-Jump! In this retro platform game made by Nitrome, you have to jump up as fast as possible! Wait too long, and the rising water will catch up with you and it's game over! Your character has a limited amount of jumps, so space out your moves wisely! There's 10 different levels to hop trough - can you jump through them all? How to play J-J-Jump? Use the left and right arrow keys to move! Use the up key to jump! Who created J-J-Jump? J-J-Jump is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play J-J-Jump for free? You can play J-J-Jump for free on Poki. Can I play J-J-Jump on mobile devices and desktop? J-J-Jump can be played on your computer only.
